Company

Who We Serve Case Studies About Us Contact

Comprehensive Portfolio Management

Professional investment management aligned with your retirement goals and risk tolerance.

Investment Management Built for Retirement

Your portfolio needs to serve a different purpose in retirement. We manage it accordingly.

Income
Primary Goal

Reliable Cash Flow

Retirement portfolios must generate consistent income. We build portfolios designed to fund your lifestyle regardless of market conditions.

Growth
Secondary Goal

Outpace Inflation

Your portfolio still needs to grow to keep pace with inflation over a 30-year retirement horizon.

Protection
Critical Goal

Preserve Capital

Sequence-of-returns risk is real. We structure portfolios to weather downturns without derailing your plan.

Our Investment Approach

Principle 1

Low-Cost Diversification

We use low-cost index funds and ETFs to build broadly diversified portfolios. Keeping costs low is one of the most reliable ways to improve long-term returns.

Typical Expense Ratios:

  • Index funds: 0.03% - 0.10%
  • Bond funds: 0.05% - 0.15%
  • International: 0.07% - 0.20%
Principle 2

Risk-Appropriate Allocation

We match your portfolio's risk profile to your retirement timeline, income needs, and personal risk tolerance. No cookie-cutter allocations.

Factors We Consider:

  • Years until and into retirement
  • Income needs and sources
  • Tax situation and account types
  • Legacy goals
Principle 3

Tax-Efficient Placement

Which investments go in which accounts matters. We optimize asset location to minimize your overall tax burden.

Asset Location Strategy:

  • Tax-inefficient assets in tax-deferred accounts
  • Growth assets in Roth accounts
  • Tax-efficient assets in taxable accounts
Principle 4

Disciplined Rebalancing

Markets move. We systematically rebalance portfolios to maintain your target allocation and manage risk.

Our Process:

  • Regular portfolio monitoring
  • Tax-aware rebalancing
  • Opportunistic harvesting of losses

Portfolio Strategies for Different Stages

Pre-Retirement (5-10 Years Out)

Transitioning from accumulation to preservation while maintaining growth potential.

60/40 Allocation Growth Focus

Early Retirement (Years 1-10)

Income generation with inflation protection. Building a reliable withdrawal strategy.

50/50 Allocation Income Focus

Late Retirement (Years 10+)

Capital preservation with legacy planning considerations and required distribution management.

40/60 Allocation Preservation

Ongoing Portfolio Management

1

Daily Monitoring

We monitor your portfolio and the markets daily, watching for risks and opportunities.

2

Quarterly Reviews

Detailed performance reviews with you, including comparisons to benchmarks and plan projections.

3

Annual Rebalancing

Strategic rebalancing aligned with tax planning and any changes to your financial situation.

4

Life Event Adjustments

When life changes, your portfolio adapts. We adjust strategies for major milestones and market events.

Ready for Professional Portfolio Management?

Let us align your investments with your retirement goals.
